intentSynonyms: permanently delete a message in slack
delete a message from a channel in slack
description: Delete a Slack message. The caller must be the original author, or the channel must allow message deletion.

channel.description: Channel ID where the message is located (e.g., C01234567)

ts.description: Timestamp of the message to delete — serves as the unique message ID (e.g., 1234567890.123456)
